title: Make payment submission idempotent
description: Key each payment attempt by an idempotency token so retries and double-clicks charge exactly once.
body: Use when submitting a payment that may be retried by the client, a proxy, or a network timeout. Do not treat each request as a fresh charge — a retried or double-clicked submission then charges the customer twice. Actions: generate an idempotency key per logical attempt, record it before calling the processor, and return the original result on a repeat key. Validation signals include a duplicate request producing one charge and one order. Risk boundary: money movement is advisory here and defers to business.finance under a human gate — never auto-retry a charge without an idempotency key and approval.
